text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's raining on the day of the autumn Tenno Sho.
Even the clouds hang heavy with the gravity of
this momentous race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Mejiro Palmer and Daitaku Helios do
not bow to either authority or the weather. They
give an uninhibited war cry and begin the race.
